title: Target AI Summaries
content:
# Target AI Summaries You can create detailed targeted summaries about an Asset. These help summarize the data and bring new insights and ideas to help optimize the performance of the asset. ## Summarize Asset You can ask to summarize an asset either through a prompt or by clicking on the **Summarize** button on the Asset Details. ## Hands-On Test Drive Explore this feature in Action.
## Results ### Trends Table This will give a table listing all the data streams connected with the asset and some analytical statistics such as; * 1 day average * 30 day average * Difference between averages * Standard deviation of the average difference * Trending direction ### Trend Analysis An AI analysis report on the current trends and what it could mean. ### Performance Evaluation An AI generated review of the current performance of the Asset. ### Issues and Recommendations Kelvin AI will do a deep review of the data and identify potential current issues on the Asset. It will also try to give some recommendations on how to resolve the issues. ### Conclusions A conclusion to all the summarized information for the asset. ## AI Generated Graphs You can also quickly generate graphs on the Asset's data streams through the Kelvin AI prompt. For example if you type; ``` plot the rod load for the past week for beam pump #01 ``` You'll get a response similar to this.
summary: You can create detailed targeted summaries about an Asset. These help summarize the data and bring new insights and ideas to help optimize the performance of the asset. <iframe width="800" height="450" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/iEzLNn1ugT...
